introduction.title: 1. Introduction
content: Heroapps Software Development Services (“us”, “we”, or “our”) operates the website at https://heroapps.com.ph, which will be referred to as the “Service” hereafter.
This Privacy Policy governs your visit to the Service and explains how we collect, protect, and disclose information that results from your use of the Service.

We use your data to provide and improve the Service. By using the Service, you agree to the collection and use of your information under this Policy. Unless otherwise defined in this Privacy Policy, the terms used in this Policy have the same meanings as in our Terms and Conditions.
Our Terms and Conditions (“Terms”) govern the use of the Service, and together with this Privacy Policy, they constitute the Agreement between you and us.

sections.title: 2. Definitions
sections.content: PERSONAL DATA means any information that relates to an identified or identifiable natural person. USAGE DATA is data collected automatically, either generated by the use of the Service or from the Service's infrastructure itself (e.g., the duration of a page visit). COOKIES are small files stored on your device (computer or mobile device) that contain data that can be accessed by the Service. DATA CONTROLLER means a natural or legal person who, alone or jointly with others, determines the purposes and means of processing Personal Data. DATA PROCESSORS (OR SERVICE PROVIDERS) means any natural or legal person who processes Personal Data on behalf of the Data Controller. We may use the services of various Service Providers to process your data more effectively. DATA SUBJECT is any natural person whose Personal Data is being processed. THE USER is the individual using the Service and corresponds to the Data Subject, who is the subject of Personal Data.

sections.title: 3. Information Collection and Use
sections.content: We collect various types of information for multiple purposes to provide and improve our Service to you.

sections.title: Personal Data
sections.content: While using our Service, we may request that you provide us with specific personally identifiable information that can be used to contact or identify you (“Personal Data”). Personally identifiable information may include, but is not limited to:

items: Address, country, state, province, postal code, city

sections.content: We may use your Data to contact you with newsletters, marketing or promotional materials, and other information that may be of interest to you. You have the right to opt out of receiving any or all of these communications from us by following the unsubscribe link.
